steps.prompt:
Weekly OpenAI ecosystem scan. Check these sources:

1. **Codex CLI**: Run `npm view @openai/codex versions --json | tail -10` for recent releases. Check github.com/openai/codex for changelog/issues.
2. **Models**: Search for new GPT/o-series model releases, deprecations, pricing changes.
3. **API**: Search for OpenAI API changelog — new endpoints, tools, response format changes.
4. **SDKs**: Check PyPI openai and openai-agents versions. New features, breaking changes.
5. **Agents SDK**: Check github.com/openai/openai-agents-python for new patterns, tools, handoff mechanisms.
6. **OpenAI blog**: Search for recent OpenAI announcements.

No existing baseline memo — create one if significant findings.

Write delta to .claude/plans/vendor-openai-delta.md with sections: ## New Releases, ## Model Updates, ## API Changes, ## SDK Changes, ## Handoff.

Read .claude/plans/vendor-openai-delta.md — focus on ## Handoff.

Assess relevance: (1) model-review and model-guide skills route to GPT — any capability or API changes? (2) llmx routes to OpenAI — any breaking changes? (3) Codex CLI used in code-review — new features or breaking changes? (4) Agents SDK patterns we should adopt?

If significant findings, create or update agent-infra/research/openai-landscape.md.
Write actionable items to .claude/plans/vendor-openai-actions.md.
Commit any research docs with [vendor-scan] prefix.
